findings.summary: Mixed units in token group "radius": rem + px
findings.expected: One physical unit per token group (print uses inches; web uses px or rem)
findings.actual: Group "radius" mixes rem and px across 8 children
findings.suggestedAction: Convert outliers to the dominant unit, or split into separate groups

findings.summary: Mixed units in token group "spacing.print.whitepaper.body": in + pt
findings.expected: One physical unit per token group (print uses inches; web uses px or rem)
findings.actual: Group "spacing.print.whitepaper.body" mixes in and pt across 26 children
findings.suggestedAction: Convert outliers to the dominant unit, or split into separate groups

findings.summary: Mixed units in token group "spacing.print.cover": px + in
findings.expected: One physical unit per token group (print uses inches; web uses px or rem)
findings.actual: Group "spacing.print.cover" mixes px and in across 8 children
findings.suggestedAction: Convert outliers to the dominant unit, or split into separate groups
